fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color layers (COLR table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains color layers; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color PNG glyphs (CBDT/CBLC tables).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains color PNG glyphs; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color SVG glyphs (SVG table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains color SVG glyphs; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color palette data (CPAL table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains color palettes; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains variable font data (fvar table).
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains variable font data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of named instances defined in the variable font.
fields.value: The number of named instances in the font.

fields.summary: Gets the number of color palettes defined in the font.
fields.value: The number of color palettes in the font.

entries.signature: public bool TryFindVariationAxis (HarfBuzzSharp.Tag tag, out HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo axisInfo);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the variation axis was found; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Attempts to find the variation axis with the specified tag.

params.axisInfo: When this method returns, contains the variation axis information if found. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.
params.tag: The four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined in the variable font.
fields.value: The number of variation axes in the font.

fields.summary: Gets information about all variation axes defined in the variable font.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo" /> structs describing each variation axis.
